name: awesome-loadmore-design-md
description: Curated collection of DESIGN.md files extracted from websites featured on loadmo.re

scripts.build:fast: node scripts/capture-sites.mjs --concurrency=4 --limit=12 && node scripts/fill-fallback-captures.mjs && node scripts/generate-site-files.mjs && node scripts/build-agent-index.mjs && node scripts/validate-repo.mjs
